content: We can reframe Merriam-Webster's original definition of a general agent (an entity that exerts power to produce effects) as a biological/chemical infectious agent, and hypothesize that ICM-powered 2025 autonomous AI agents act like self-propagating biological infectious agents: their intrinsic curiosity reward drives them to seek out new unvisited environment 'hosts' to spread their influence and replicate their core policy structures, rather than only optimizing for pre-specified human designer goals.
